archetype: Archetype 5: Jewel & Luxury (adapted for futuristic UI)
core_design_principles: Glass OS Style: Heavily rely on 'expo-blur' for frosted glass effects layered over deep atmospheric dark backgrounds.
Neon Illumination: Use electric blue, soft purple, and neon cyan sparingly as glowing accents, not dominant blocks of color.
Tactile Depth: Surfaces should have subtle 1px inner borders to simulate glass edge reflections.
Clean Typography: Use structured, premium sans-serifs. Ditch Inter for headings; use Outfit for a modern, geometric feel.

GlassCard.usage: Dashboard summary, Analytics charts, Tips cards.

FloatingActionButton.style: absolute bottom-6 right-6 w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-primary items-center justify-center shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(59,130,246,0.5)]

BottomTabBar.style: absolute bottom-0 w-full h-24 border-t border-white/10 bg-transparent

TransactionItem.style: flex-row items-center justify-between p-4 bg-white/5 rounded-2xl mb-3 border border-white/5
TransactionItem.left: Category Icon in a rounded-xl container with a subtle tint of the category color
TransactionItem.right: Amount (Green for Income, Red for Expense) + Date

Splash.layout: Centered logo and text over deep background gradient.
Splash.animations: Fade in + slight scale up. App Name 'NSIAP Expense Tracker' followed by delayed fade-in of subtitle 'by NSIAP Enterprises'.

Onboarding.layout: Carousel (3-4 screens). Each screen has a glowing abstract illustration, a bold H2, and a brief description.
Onboarding.controls: Glassmorphic 'Next' button or Swipe to continue.

Auth.layout: Glass card containing inputs over a subtly glowing background (purple/blue soft radial gradients behind the card).
Auth.inputs: bg-black/40 border border-white/10 rounded-xl p-4 text-white placeholder-gray-500.

Dashboard.hero: Total Balance Glass Card (spanning full width). Shows balance with neon cyan glow.
Dashboard.sections: Recent Transactions list, Monthly Summary mini-chart.

Analytics.charts: React Native SVG Charts or Victory Native. Pie chart with segments in primary, secondary, highlight. Bar chart for weekly trends.

AddTransaction.layout: Modal (Sheet) sliding up from bottom. Glassmorphic background.
AddTransaction.fields: Segmented control (Income/Expense), Amount Input (massive text size), Category Grid, Date Picker, Note.

icons.strategy: Minimalist, line-based icons. Do not use filled icons unless representing an active state.

animations.transitions: Keep them fast (200-300ms). Heavy animations feel cheap in utility apps. Smooth page transitions via expo-router.
animations.interactions: Buttons should slightly scale down (0.95) on press.

testing.data_testid_convention: All interactive elements MUST include testID (React Native) or data-testid (Web).

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure you are using Expo SDK 50+ and expo-router. Use `expo-blur` for all glassmorphic components to guarantee native performance. Create pure `.js` files as requested. Wrap all text in a custom <Text> component that sets the default font family to Manrope. For radial glowing background effects, use `expo-linear-gradient` or React Native SVG radial gradients positioned absolutely behind the main content. Apply rigorous testIDs to all touchables.
